text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory suffers an injury, so I hurry her
over to the infirmary in concern.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Don't look so worried! It's just a scratch!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! If you're really worried, I can try
running on dirt! Dirt tracks put a lot less strain on
your body!
choice_data_list: I'd prefer you rest, just to be safe...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I understand. I'll be good and rest until my
injury heals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know you've got my back, so I don't want to
worry you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Osu! I'm really good at pacing myself, so you can
rest easy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... I did this back when I was having trouble
with my nails, so I thought it'd be okay...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I knew I'd be fine!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No way an injury like this is gonna stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running on dirt ends up being an effective way
for Bamboo to jump back into training!
